==Pokémon==
This listing is of Professor Kukui's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:
===On hand===
{{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}}
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Braviary
|type1=Normal
|type2=Flying
|img=Kukui Braviary.png
|gender=male
|epnum=SM052
|epname=Revealing the Stuff of Legend!
|vajp=
|vaen=Ryan Nicolls
|desc=Professor Kukui's {{p|Braviary}} first appeared in ''[[SM052|Revealing the Stuff of Legend!]]'', where he used him to help {{an|Professor Burnet}} escape from a group of {{p|Jangmo-o}} and {{p|Hakamo-o}} at the [[Vast Poni Canyon]].

In ''[[SM055|The Professors' New Adventure!]]'', Braviary attended the wedding of Professor Kukui and Professor Burnet as Kukui's partner Pokémon.

In ''[[SM089|The Prism Between Light and Darkness!]]'', Braviary attacked [[Team Rocket]]'s helicopter. He battled [[Gozu]] alongside {{an|Faba}}'s {{p|Alakazam}} and {{p|Hypno}}, only to be knocked out by Gozu's {{me|Aggron}}'s {{m|Heavy Slam}}.

Braviary appeared in a flashback in ''[[SM137|The Wisdom Not to Run!]]'', where he was seen defeating [[Guzma]]'s {{p|Golisopod}}.

Kukui used Braviary in his [[Full Battle]] with Ash in ''[[SM141|Exhibition Unmasked!]]'' and ''[[SM142|A Full Battle Bounty!]]''. He defeated [[Ash's Lycanroc]], but lost to his {{AP|Rowlet}}.

Braviary's known moves are {{m|Brave Bird}}, {{m|Rock Slide}}, {{m|Sky Drop}}, {{m|Steel Wing}}, and {{m|Superpower}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Incineroar
|type1=Fire
|type2=Dark
|stage1=Litten
|stage2=Torracat
|main=yes
|img=Kukui Incineroar.png
|epnum=SM063
|epname=Pushing the Fiery Envelope!
|vajp=Toru Sakurai
|vaen=H.D. Quinn
|desc=Professor Kukui's alias, the Masked Royal, commonly uses an {{p|Incineroar}} in the [[Battle Royal]]. It was first seen in ''[[SM063|Pushing the Fiery Envelope!]]'', where it took part in a Battle Royal against Ash's {{p|Litten}}, [[Kiawe's Marowak]], and [[Sophocles's Charjabug]], easily winning despite holding back. It was later used in another battle against Ash's Litten, during which Litten evolved into a {{AP|Torracat}}. Despite this, Incineroar still won the battle.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Lucario
|type1=Fighting
|type2=Steel
|img=Kukui Lucario.png
|epnum=SM140
|epname=Z-Move Showdown!
|vajp=
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc=Professor Kukui's alias, the Masked Royal, has a {{p|Lucario}}. He used it in ''[[SM140|Z-Move Showdown!]]'' in order to battle a {{Shiny}} {{DL|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Shiny Guzzlord|Guzzlord}} that had emerged through an [[Ultra Wormhole]]. However, it was defeated and recalled to its {{i|Poké Ball}}.

Lucario reappeared in ''[[SM142|A Full Battle Bounty!]]'' and ''[[SM143|Fiery Surprises!]]'', where it was Kukui's fifth Pokémon in his [[Full Battle]] with Ash. It went up against {{AP|Naganadel}} and eventually lost.

Lucario's known moves are {{m|Close Combat}}, {{m|Dragon Pulse}}, and {{m|Extreme Speed}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Venusaur
|type1=Grass
|type2=Poison
|img=Kukui Venusaur.png
|gender=male
|epnum=SM142
|epname=A Full Battle Bounty!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Venusaur}} is Professor Kukui's fourth known Pokémon. He used him in his [[Full Battle]] against {{Ash}} in ''[[SM142|A Full Battle Bounty!]]'', where he went up against {{AP|Rowlet}} and won. Venusaur went up against {{AP|Torracat}}, but was defeated.

Venusaur's known moves are {{m|Solar Beam}}, {{m|Sludge Bomb}}, and {{m|Vine Whip}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
| trainer = Professor Kukui
| pkmn = Empoleon
| type1 = Water
| type2 = Steel
| img = Kukui Empoleon.png
| epnum = SM142
| epname = A Full Battle Bounty!
| vajp = 
| vaen = Bill Rogers
| desc = {{p|Empoleon}} is Professor Kukui's fifth known Pokémon. He used it in his [[Full Battle]] against {{Ash}} in ''[[SM142|A Full Battle Bounty!]]''. It went up against {{AP|Pikachu}}, damaging and disorienting him before Ash switched to {{AP|Melmetal}}, who managed to defeat Empoleon quite easily. Professor Kukui also uses Empoleon to swim all around the world, researching sea currents.

Empoleon's known moves are {{m|Metal Claw}}, {{m|Drill Peck}}, {{m|Whirlpool}}, and {{m|Hydro Pump}}.
}}

===Temporary===
{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Ash
|pkmn=Naganadel
|type1=Poison
|type2=Dragon
|img=Ash Naganadel Gigavolt Havoc.png
|epnum=SM067
|epname=Love at First Twirl!
|vajp=Rikako Aikawa
|vaen=Lisa Ortiz
|desc=As the Masked Royal, Kukui temporarily paired up with Ash's newly-returned {{AP|Naganadel}} to help Ash and {{AP|Pikachu}} blow back a {{pkmn2|giant}} {{Shiny}} {{DL|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Shiny Guzzlord|Guzzlord}} back to [[Ultra Space]] with the combined force of two {{m|Gigavolt Havoc}}s.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Professor Kukui
|pkmn=Tapu Koko
|type1=Electric
|type2=Fairy
|img=Kukui Tapu Koko.png
|epnum=SM001
|epname=Alola to New Adventure!
|vajp=Rikako Aikawa
|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|main=Guardian deities (anime)
|main_section=Tapu Koko
|desc={{p|Tapu Koko}} temporarily teamed up with Professor Kukui during his [[Full Battle]] against Ash during the [[Manalo Conference]]. In ''[[SM143|Fiery Surprises!]]'', Tapu Koko stopped Professor Kukui from sending out his last Pokémon by slapping away the {{i|Poké Ball}} in his hand, indicating that it wanted to battle Ash as Kukui's final Pokémon. Kukui accepted this offer. The battle commenced in ''[[SM144|From Z to Shining Z!]]'', where Tapu Koko faced [[Ash's Naganadel]] and won, before going up against Pikachu.

Along with its fellow deities, Tapu Koko restored Z-Power to Ash and Kukui's Z-Rings and gave Kukui a [[Tapunium Z]], allowing it to perform {{m|Guardian of Alola}}, while Ash and Pikachu countered with {{m|10,000,000 Volt Thunderbolt}}. Pikachu's Z-Move managed to overpower Tapu Koko's Z-Move, leading to Tapu Koko fainting and making Ash the winner of the exhibition match. Afterwards, Tapu Koko was restored by Tapu Lele's scales and thanked by Kukui for battling well.}}

===Befriended===
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Ash
|pkmn=Rockruff
|main=yes
|type1=Rock

|cap=Professor Kukui's Rockruff
|epnum=SM002
|epname=The Guardian's Challenge!
|vajp=Megumi Hayashibara
|vaen=Haven Paschall
|desc={{p|Rockruff}} is a wild Pokémon Professor Kukui took under his care. In ''[[SM015|Rocking Clawmark Hill!]]'', he encouraged {{Ash}} to catch it after seeing the bond the two had developed.}}

|epnum=SM125
|epname=A Timeless Encounter!
|vaen=
|desc=Elder (Japanese: '''オー{{tt|爺|じい}}''' ''Ohjī'') was a {{pkmn2|Totem}} {{p|Trevenant}} that Professor Kukui befriended when he was young. It gave him a [[Firium Z]] after he began his [[Pokémon journey]]. It was revealed that, sometime after the young Professor Kukui met {{Ash}}, Trevenant had passed away and now appears as an ordinary tree.

None of Trevenant's moves are known.}}

===Caring for===
Ash left the remainder of his [[Alola]]n party with Professors Kukui and Burnet in ''[[SM146|Thank You, Alola! The Journey Continues!]]'' as he set out to travel the {{pkmn|world}}.
